sources: https://battlebots.fandom.com/api.php (MediaWiki API, per-robot 'Bot' infoboxes and per-team 'Team' infoboxes)
notes: Active roster = the 24 competitors in Groups A-F of the 2026 'BattleBots Pro League powered by Bright Data' (premiered July 2, 2026 on YouTube after a delay from the announced June 25 date), as listed on the BattleBots fan wiki Pro League page; battlebots.com/proleague confirms 24 robots but publishes no roster table. Claw Viper, Hydra, Deep-Sea Shark, Whiplash and SawBlaze were invited/announced but withdrew or declined and were replaced by Disarray, Switchback, Ribbot and Bloodsport; Calypso, Banshee and Nemesis are 2026 alternates (active=false). Hometowns, teams, weapons, seasons and captains come from battlebots.fandom.com infoboxes; where a team relocated, the first-listed (original) hometown is used. Season labels: WC I-VII are the 2015-2023 reboot seasons; Comedy Central seasons 1.0-5.0 are 2000-2002; spinoffs (Bounty Hunters, Champions I/II, Proving Ground, FaceOffs) listed where the wiki records them. Historical coverage is a curated ~100-bot subset of well-known competitors, not the complete all-time field.
